queries.question: What wheelchair assistance is available at entrance A and what mobility scooters are available at the same location?
queries.sql:
SELECT Passenger.FullName
FROM Passenger
WHERE (Passenger.mobilityAids = "Wheelchair Assistance" OR Passenger.mobilityAids = "Mobility Scooter") AND Passenger.pickUpDropOffLocation = "Entrance A"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?passenger a :Passengers .
  ?passenger p:name ?fullname .
  ?passenger p:mobilityAids ?mobilityaids_w .
  ?passenger p:mobilityAids ?mobilityaids_w2 .
  ?passenger p:pickUpDropOffLocation ?pickupdropofflocation_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?mobilityaids_w) = "Wheelchair Assistance" || STR(?mobilityaids_w2) = "Mobility Scooter")) && STR(?pickupdropofflocation_w) = "Entrance A"))
}

queries.question: Show me the wheelchair assistance and mobility scooters available at entrance A.
queries.sql:
SELECT Passenger.FullName
FROM Passenger
WHERE Passenger.mobilityAids = "Wheelchair Assistance" OR Passenger.mobilityAids = "Mobility Scooter" AND Passenger.pickUpDropOffLocation = "Entrance A"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?passenger a :Passengers .
  ?passenger p:name ?fullname .
  ?passenger p:mobilityAids ?mobilityaids_w .
  ?passenger p:mobilityAids ?mobilityaids_w2 .
  ?passenger p:pickUpDropOffLocation ?pickupdropofflocation_w .
  FILTER((STR(?mobilityaids_w) = "Wheelchair Assistance" || (STR(?mobilityaids_w2) = "Mobility Scooter" && STR(?pickupdropofflocation_w) = "Entrance A")))
}
